memoryParityRules.rule: Predicta knows the Vedic focus order is D1, Moon/Chandra Lagna, D9, D10, Chalit.
Predicta knows the focus charts are not the only charts; the full Varga library remains selectable.
Predicta knows every supported selected chart receives a useful prediction-first summary.
Predicta has a first-class Swamsa memory section and can explain it without mixing schools.
Predicta has a first-class Karakamsha memory section and can explain it without mixing schools.
Predicta knows Chalit is lived house delivery and must distinguish it from D1.
Predicta knows main Vedic report chart plates exclude micro/special points and outer planets.
Predicta knows Mahadasha Phala has a dedicated structure and layered current-period explanation.
Predicta knows the report uses one consolidated remedy/action plan instead of duplicate remedy blocks.
Predicta knows Vedic, KP, Nadi, Numerology, and Signature reports are separate lanes.
Predicta knows KP must use Bhav Chalit/cusp-oriented evidence and not D1 as the primary KP chart surface.
Predicta knows Nadi remains story-link and validation-first without unsupported palm-leaf claims.
Predicta knows free stays useful and premium adds evidence, timing, contradictions, and practical depth.
Predicta knows PDF is the complete dossier surface and app screens are progressive exploration surfaces.

contextPath: packages/config/src/predictaMemory.ts exports PREDICTA_APP_MEMORY_DIGEST and report section memory.
Web and mobile report handoffs carry reportFocus, reportSchoolLane, available sections, and selected section prompts.
